items.title: Outlier handling pipeline
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  raw["raw feature"] --> detect["detect: IQR or z-score"]
  detect --> decide{"error or signal?"}
  decide -->|"error"| remove["remove or impute"]
  decide -->|"signal"| robust["robust model or clip"]
  decide -->|"uncertain"| clip["winsorize bounds"]
  remove --> model["downstream model"]
  robust --> model
  clip --> model
items.caption: Detection is only the first step; treatment depends on whether extremes are noise, valuable signal, or ambiguous.

items.title: IQR fences on a box plot mental model
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  q1["Q1"] --> iqr["IQR = Q3 - Q1"]
  q3["Q3"] --> iqr
  iqr --> low["lower fence: Q1 - 1.5*IQR"]
  iqr --> high["upper fence: Q3 + 1.5*IQR"]
  low --> flag["flag x outside fences"]
  high --> flag
items.caption: Tukey's rule uses quartiles and IQR; points beyond the fences are candidate outliers.
